---
name: Implementation issue
about: Bounded implementation work with explicit acceptance criteria
title: ""
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Objective

What must become true?

## Invariants

Properties that must hold in every implementation.

## User-visible behavior

What should the agent, CLI user, or reviewer observe?

## Out of scope

What must not be added during this issue?

## Compatibility

What existing files, commands, or schemas must continue working?

## Acceptance criteria

Concrete pass/fail conditions.

## Validation

Automated tests and manual scenarios required.

## Run record

`.moraine/runs/<record>.md`
